morning_brief.preview:
---
# EverPass Morning Brief — Thursday, May 14, 2026

## Critical / Time-Sensitive

1. **SAMSUNG CTV** — T-6 DAYS TO LAUNCH (May 20) [UNSIGNED]
   Separate Agreement still not executed; Samsung Standard Terms revenue/ad share exemption contingent on this document. Push Annie O'Brien (a1.obrien@samsung.com), CC Chi Tung for signature today — 14:30 Hardware GTM Standup (Horowitz/Kaplan/Clessuras) is a natural escalation touchpoint.
   **Deadline: May 20 (6 days) — action required TODAY**

2. **NESN** — DEADLINE PASSED (May 13) [STATUS UNKNOWN]
   Clean term sheet v7 (Bob Plaehn / Goldwyn Harper) deadline passed yesterday with no confirmed response. MG structure ($300K combined Yrs 1–2 / $350K/yr from Yr 3) and Gate 3 clearance remain unresolved. Escalate immediately — status unknown, check cockpit.
   **Deadline: PASSED — escalate today**

3. **CHARTER** — F&B PRICING TIERS DUE TOMORROW (May 15)
   Hospitality/F&B tiers (Chili's co-sell, FCO sub-350 thresholds) due May 15. Exhibit A (NFLST pricing) overdue +29 days; Exhibit B (Company Approved Offers) overdue +13 days. Use 14:30 Hardware GTM Standup (Clessuras/Holden present) to confirm path forward on all three.
   **Deadline: May 15 (tomorrow)**

4. **DIRECTV** — SYMPHONYAI AUDIT DEMAND LAPSED (+13 DAYS)
   May 1 deadline for SymphonyAI file access passed; no confirmed DTV delivery. Net underpayment claim $2,634,239.50; $65M second payment outstanding; litigation complaint near-ready. Confirm status with Brianna Santolli / Kelley Drye today.
   **Deadline: PASSED (+13 days) — escalate immediately**

5. **DISH** — CALL OCCURRED (May 13) [NOT IN DEAL TRACKER]
   Call with Katherine Richter (Katherine.Richter@dish.com) took place yesterday; Charter-parallel packaging model discussed, Dish Business receptive. Outcome not logged in deal tracker — capture notes and define next action before details go cold.
   **Deadline: Log today**

6. **CHARTER (LANGE TRIGGER)** — STATUS UNKNOWN
   Lange trigger was flagged for May 12 execution — no confirmed status in current context. Verify whether triggered at 14:30 Hardware GTM Standup with Clessuras.
   **Deadline: VERIFY TODAY**

7. **MARQUEE** — COUNTER-SIGNATURE OUTSTANDING
   Alex Kaplan signed execution copy; Marquee counter-signature pending Ryan's go/no-go communication to Lee. Decision still open. A la carte only framework; long-form by July 2026.
   **Deadline: Go/No-Go communication — no confirmed date, treat as urgent**

---

## Active Deal Status

Partner              | Status                        | Next Action                                                  | Deadline
---------------------|-------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------|----------
Samsung CTV          | UNSIGNED — T-6 days           | Push Annie O'Brien for signature; use 14:30 GTM Standup      | May 20

deals.next_action: (Active, Distribution): Counter expected 5/6-5/9 (Holden 5/5 ETA). NBA scope reply drafted, awaiting Ryan's send. Amended agreement deadline 6/15/2026. Spectrum TV Control Pro delayed 7/13. Fire Stick joint sales alignment needed before 5/21 STVA launch.
(Exploratory): Catch up rescheduled 5/5 to 5/7 10:30 (Gardiner). CONFLICT with Mediacom Discussion same slot 5/7 10:30. Project Gladiator boxing/FIFA+ scoping. Pre-commercial.
(Live): Bi-weekly integration 5/6 11:00 AM (Hegeman + cross-team). F1 Miami GP delivered 5/3. Watch IMAX expansion risk to MLS Season Pass and MLB Friday Night Baseball.
(Active, FAST): McCormack offering Fri 5/8 9:00-10:30 PT or 12:30-1:30 PT. Reply today. Executable draft 11 days overdue. Two-track deal: Weather API + 24/7 FAST channel; targeting late-May launch.
(Active, RSN): Plaehn 2nd chase 5/5 17:08Z. Respond within today or tomorrow. Term sheet v7 in NESN court since 4/12.
(Near Close, RSN): DocuSign 4/29 (Bernheimer); 5/1 follow-up. Ryan owes signature. July 2026 launch.
(Closed): NWSL amendment fully executed 2026-05-02 via DocuSign. Monitoring only.
(Legal Route Only): Legal + PR posture only per 5/5 directive. No commercial response. Rack rates NOT to be quoted.
(Active, Content): Altman 5/5 outbound on schedule. McIntosh Track A/B direction still overdue. EVO pricing gap and DAI impression share blank still open.

(Active, Content): Upfront 5/11 streaming. NBA confirmed NOT in commercial grant per 5/5 verification. Side letter or amendment required for any NBA commercial offering. CRITICAL mortality risk; term expires 2027-07-31 (~15 mo).
(Near Close, CTV): CTV launch 5/20 (14 days). Separate Agreement drafted, NOT executed. Without signature Samsung standard terms apply. Legal close needed this week.
(Active, RSN): Feneque 4/29 inbound on Exhibit B device multiplier discussion (3 fix options). Catch up next week.
